stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Performance Manual MRJT 1 Figure 4.5.
Consider the take-off performance for the twin jet aeroplane climb limit chart. Why has the wind been omitted from the chart?

options.a: There is a built-in safety measure.
options.b: The limitation presented in this chart is taken relative to air.
options.c: The effect of the wind must be taken from another chart.
options.d: There is no effect of the wind on the climb angle relative to the ground.
